mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_score (user_id, title, artist, image_url, tuning, capo, bpm, is_public, memo) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{artist}, #{imageUrl}, #{tuning}, #{capo}, #{bpm}, #{isPublic}, #{memo})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, artist, image_url, tuning, capo, bpm, is_public, memo, created_at FROM t_score WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_score WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
